keywords.note: Defines a reference type with a constructor
Defines a method or function

Delays evaluation of a val until first access
Singleton object — combines class and its only instance

Immutable value binding
Mutable variable binding

Collects for-comprehension results into a collection
Marks a class or member as requiring a concrete implementation

Required keyword when redefining a member from a superclass
Restricts subclassing to the same compilation unit
Mixes in additional traits
Declares an abstract class or member

Prevents subclassing or member override
Forces inlining of a method or value at each call site (Scala 3)
Defers initialisation until first use
Allows subclassing from other files (Scala 3)
Required when shadowing a supertype member
Limits direct subclasses to the current source file

Allows a method to be called in infix notation
